findings: No test for banned-model rejection or premium model policy enforcement beyond existence checks (tests/smoke-test.sh:127-141)
Smoke-agent stub unrealistic: no branch creation, no atomic temp+rename writes, no partial/failure paths (tests/smoke-test.sh:24-58)
mktemp -d at line 9 creates /tmp dir — fails in restricted environments
Structured contract assertion missing: depth_budget.squads_max, profile, swarm_scale, per_commander_full_swarm in swarm-state.json (tests/smoke-test.sh:135-148)
child-agents.jsonl commander_registered check present and correct (tests/smoke-test.sh:145-147)
90s poll loop is fragile and can false-fail on slow CI (tests/smoke-test.sh:151-159)
No assertion for stampede/task branch creation by worker (tests/smoke-test.sh)
